source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Read_PROD_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Read_PROD_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Read_PROD_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Read_PROD_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Replicate Tables' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167_') AS Write_DEV_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE_Replicate_TASK_RELATED_RELEASE167__sink_TableName;
